creative_premise: The Weather Inside a Bell is a playable atmospheric instrument where touch bends weather and strikes synthetic metal.
completed_slice: Added a post-deployment verifier and a generated deployment proof that bind the public GitHub Pages artifact to the exact source commit while enforcing the artwork identity boundary.

verification_contract.proof: deployment.json must report the workflow commit and artifact id the-weather-inside-a-bell
verification_contract.surface: served index.html must identify The Weather Inside a Bell
verification_contract.boundary: served page must not contain Mirror Cartographer, payment, checkout, or dashboard language

limits: A committed deployment verifier is not evidence that Pages deployed. Public URL and served commit remain unverified until a workflow run succeeds.
